description: Utility-first CSS framework with JIT compiler and PostCSS plugin - Lightweight alternative to Tailwind CSS
readme:
# Atomos CSS > Utility-first CSS framework with JIT compiler and PostCSS plugin [![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@poliedro69/atomos-css.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@poliedro69/atomos-css) [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) [![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-Ready-blue.svg)](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) Atomos CSS is a lightweight, utility-first CSS framework with a powerful JIT (Just-In-Time) compiler and PostCSS plugin. It's a modern alternative to Tailwind CSS, designed to be fast, flexible, and easy to use. ## ✨ Features - 🚀 **JIT Compiler** - Generates only the CSS you actually use (~3-10 KB) - 📦 **PostCSS Plugin** - Seamless integration with modern build tools - 🎨 **Design Tokens** - Complete, type-safe design system - ⚡ **Fast** - Intelligent caching and optimized performance - 🔥 **HMR Support** - Hot Module Replacement out of the box - 📝 **TypeScript** - Fully typed for better DX - 🎯 **CLI** - Command-line interface for quick setup - 🪶 **Lightweight** - ~50 KB core, minimal dependencies ## 📦 Installation ```bash npm install @poliedro69/atomos-css ``` ## 🚀 Quick Start ### 1. As PostCSS Plugin (Recommended) Create `postcss.config.js`: ```javascript module.exports = { plugins: [ require('@poliedro69/atomos-css')({ content: ['./src/**/*.{html,js,jsx,ts,tsx}'], }), ], }; ``` Create `src/styles.css`: ```css @atomos utilities; /* Your custom styles */ ``` Use in your HTML: ```html

Hello Atomos!

``` ### 2. As CLI ```bash # Initialize new project npx atomos init # JIT compilation npx atomos jit --watch # Full build npx atomos build ``` ### 3. As Library ```javascript import { theme, generateCSS } from '@poliedro69/atomos-css'; // Access design tokens console.log(theme.colors.primary); // Generate CSS programmatically const css = generateCSS(); ``` ## 🎨 Utility Classes ### Spacing ```html
``` ### Colors ```html
``` ### Typography ```html

``` ### Layout ```html
``` ### Responsive ```html
``` ### States ```html ``` ## 🔧 Configuration ### PostCSS Plugin Options ```javascript require('atomos-css')({ // Files to scan for classes content: ['./src/**/*.html', './src/**/*.js'], // Working directory cwd: process.cwd(), // Custom theme (optional) theme: { colors: { primary: { 500: '#custom-color' }, }, }, }) ``` ### With Vite ```javascript // vite.config.js import { defineConfig } from 'vite'; import atomosCSS from 'atomos-css'; export default defineConfig({ css: { postcss: { plugins: [ atomosCSS({ content: ['./src/**/*.{html,js,ts,jsx,tsx}'], }), ], }, }, }); ``` ### With Webpack ```javascript // webpack.config.js module.exports = { module: { rules: [ { test: /\.css$/, use: [ 'style-loader', 'css-loader', { loader: 'postcss-loader', options: { postcssOptions: { plugins: [ require('atomos-css')({ content: ['./src/**/*.html'], }), ], }, }, }, ], }, ], }, }; ``` ## 📊 Performance | Mode | Size | Classes | Build Time | Use Case | |------|------|---------|------------|----------| | Full Build | ~150 KB | ~4,700 | ~1s | Development | | JIT Compiler | ~3-10 KB | Only used | ~100ms | Production | | With Cache | ~3-10 KB | Only used | ~1ms | Subsequent builds | ## 🎯 Design System ### Colors 6 color palettes with 10 shades each (50-900): - Primary (Blue) - Secondary (Purple) - Neutral (Gray) - Success (Green) - Warning (Yellow) - Error (Red) ### Spacing 4px-based scale from 0 to 96: - `0` = 0 - `1` = 0.25rem (4px) - `4` = 1rem (16px) - `8` = 2rem (32px) - `96` = 24rem (384px) ### Typography 9 font sizes from xs to 9xl with optimized line heights ### Breakpoints - `sm`: 640px - `md`: 768px - `lg`: 1024px - `xl`: 1280px - `2xl`: 1536px ## 🛠️ CLI Commands ```bash # Show help atomos --help # Initialize project atomos init # Full build (all utilities) atomos build -o output.css # JIT compilation (only used classes) atomos jit -c "src/**/*.html" -o output.css # Watch mode atomos jit --watch # Show info atomos info ``` ## 📚 API ### Theme ```typescript import { theme } from 'atomos-css'; // Access design tokens theme.colors.primary[500] // '#3b82f6' theme.spacing[4] // '1rem' theme.typography['text-xl'] // { size: '1.25rem', lineHeight: '1.75rem' } ``` ### Generator ```typescript import { generateCSS, exportCSS } from 'atomos-css'; // Generate all utilities const css = generateCSS(); // Export to file exportCSS(css, './output.css'); ``` ### JIT Compiler ```typescript import { compile, watch } from 'atomos-css'; // Single compilation await compile(['src/**/*.html'], './output.css'); // Watch mode watch(['src/**/*.html'], './output.css'); ``` ## 🔍 How It Works 1. **Scan** - Scans your HTML/JS/TS files for class names 2. **Extract** - Extracts utility classes using regex 3. **Generate** - Generates only the CSS for classes you use 4. **Optimize** - Minifies and optimizes the output 5. **Cache** - Caches results for instant rebuilds ## 🆚 Comparison | Feature | Atomos CSS | Tailwind CSS | |---------|------------|--------------| | JIT Compilation | ✅ | ✅ | | PostCSS Plugin | ✅ | ✅ | | TypeScript | ✅ | ⚠️ Partial | | Core Size | ~50 KB | ~500 KB | | Setup Complexity | Low | Medium | | Custom Themes | ✅ | ✅ | | CLI | ✅ | ✅ | | HMR Support | ✅ | ✅ | ## 🤝 Contributing Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request. ## 📄 License MIT © [Poliedro69](https://machinetix.com) ## 🔗 Links - [Documentation](https://github.com/poliedro-69/atomos-css#readme) - [Issues](https://github.com/poliedro-69/atomos-css/issues) - [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/atomos-css) ## 💡 Examples Check out the [examples](https://github.com/poliedro-69/atomos-css/tree/main/examples) directory for: - Vite integration - Webpack setup - Next.js configuration - React components - Vue components ## 🙏 Acknowledgments Inspired by Tailwind CSS and modern utility-first CSS frameworks. --- Made with ❤️ by [Poliedro69](https://machinetix.com)
